pr.title: Non-record: 11L GEPA + 25k Steps + Pure Int6 + Legal TTT (val_bpb=1.0944) - unlimited compute category

output.summary: Uses 11L GEPA with extended 12k peak/13k warmdown training, pure int6 GPTQ-lite quant, and legal score-first TTT for incremental BPP gains.
techniques: Extended 13k-step warmdown after long peak LR plateau
Pure int6 per-row GPTQ-lite quantization with zstd-22 compression
Legal score-first TTT via SGD+momentum on frozen block subset
